nodes.name: task_helpers.py
nodes.summary: Helpers for API usage notification emails: building and sending blocked-flag and threshold-breach notifications for an organisation.

nodes.name: tasks.py
nodes.summary: Asynchronous and recurring tasks for organisation billing lifecycle: subscription cache updates, API usage notifications, overage charging, and grace-period access restriction.

nodes.name: urls.py
nodes.summary: URL routing for organisation endpoints, wiring nested routers for projects, invites, webhooks, audit logs, metadata and permission viewsets.

nodes.name: views.py
nodes.summary: Core organisation API: OrganisationViewSet with subscription, invite, usage and permission actions, the Chargebee webhook endpoint, and webhook/notification viewsets.

nodes.name: permission_service.py
nodes.summary: Central permission service computing whether users and master API keys are admins of, or hold permissions on, organisations, projects and environments, and building permitted-object querysets.

nodes.name: permissions_calculator.py
nodes.summary: Dataclasses and services that aggregate user, group and role permissions into detailed permission data for organisations, projects and environments.

nodes.name: rbac_wrapper.py
nodes.summary: Open-source stub wrapper for RBAC role-based permission helpers, returning empty results where the enterprise RBAC module is absent.
nodes.languageNotes: Open-source fallback module: enterprise RBAC functions are imported when available, otherwise no-op stubs return empty querysets.

nodes.name: createinitialproject.py
nodes.summary: Django management command that creates an initial project under an organisation during first-time setup.

nodes.name: abc.py
nodes.summary: Abstract base class defining the user interface (permission and membership checks) implemented by both FFAdminUser and APIKeyUser.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses abc.ABCMeta with __subclasshook__ for structural (duck-typed) subclass checks across user implementations.

nodes.name: admin.py
nodes.summary: Django admin configuration for the custom user model, including an inline for organisation membership.

nodes.name: auth_type.py
nodes.summary: Enum of supported user authentication types (e.g. email, Google, GitHub, SAML).

nodes.name: send_api_flags_blocked_notification
nodes.summary: Emails organisation admins that flag serving has been blocked due to API limit breach.

nodes.name: _send_api_usage_notification
nodes.summary: Sends an API usage threshold notification email and records the notification.

nodes.name: handle_api_usage_notification_for_organisation
nodes.summary: Computes current API usage versus allowance and dispatches the appropriate threshold notification, avoiding duplicates.

nodes.name: send_org_over_limit_alert
nodes.summary: Task alerting admins when an organisation exceeds its plan limits.

nodes.name: send_org_subscription_cancelled_alert
nodes.summary: Task emailing notification that an organisation's subscription was cancelled.

nodes.name: finish_subscription_cancellation
nodes.summary: Recurring task finalising due subscription cancellations by downgrading to free and cancelling users.

nodes.name: handle_api_usage_notifications
nodes.summary: Recurring task iterating organisations near their API allowance to trigger usage notifications.

nodes.name: charge_for_api_call_count_overages
nodes.summary: Recurring task charging eligible organisations for API call overages via Chargebee add-ons.

nodes.name: restrict_use_due_to_api_limit_grace_period_over
nodes.summary: Recurring task blocking flag serving for free-plan organisations whose API limit grace period has elapsed.

nodes.name: unrestrict_after_api_limit_grace_period_is_stale
nodes.summary: Recurring task lifting API limit access blocks once usage notifications are stale.

nodes.name: register_recurring_tasks
nodes.summary: Registers the organisation billing recurring tasks with their schedules.

nodes.name: OrganisationViewSet
nodes.summary: Primary organisation viewset exposing CRUD plus actions for projects, invites, usage, subscription management, portal/hosted-page URLs and permissions.

nodes.name: OrganisationWebhookViewSet
nodes.summary: Viewset managing an organisation's outbound webhook configurations.

nodes.name: OrganisationAPIUsageNotificationView
nodes.summary: Read-only view listing an organisation's API usage notifications for the current billing period.

nodes.name: chargebee_webhook
nodes.summary: Webhook endpoint dispatching Chargebee events to payment/subscription handlers.

nodes.name: is_user_organisation_admin
nodes.summary: Returns whether a user is an admin of the given organisation.

nodes.name: get_permitted_projects_for_user
nodes.summary: Builds the queryset of projects a user may access for a given permission key, including admin shortcuts and tag filtering.

nodes.name: get_permitted_projects_for_master_api_key
nodes.summary: Builds the permitted-projects queryset for a master API key using RBAC roles.

nodes.name: get_permitted_environments_for_user
nodes.summary: Builds the queryset of environments a user may access for a permission key within a project.

nodes.name: get_permitted_environments_for_master_api_key
nodes.summary: Builds the permitted-environments queryset for a master API key using RBAC roles.

nodes.name: user_has_organisation_permission
nodes.summary: Determines whether a user holds a given organisation permission directly, via group, or role.

nodes.name: _is_user_object_admin
nodes.summary: Internal helper checking user admin status against a project or environment object via user/group/role filters.

nodes.name: get_base_permission_filter
nodes.summary: Builds a combined ORM Q filter for a user's direct, group and role permissions on a model.

nodes.name: get_object_id_from_base_permission_filter
nodes.summary: Collects the set of object IDs a user may access by unioning user/group/role permission filters.

nodes.name: get_user_permission_filter
nodes.summary: Builds the ORM Q filter for a user's directly-assigned permissions.

nodes.name: get_group_permission_filter
nodes.summary: Builds the ORM Q filter for permissions granted via a user's groups.

nodes.name: PermissionData
nodes.summary: Aggregate dataclass combining user, group and role permissions and computing effective admin status and permission set.

nodes.name: _UserDetailedPermissionBuilder
nodes.summary: Builder assembling detailed per-permission provenance (direct/group/role) for a user.

nodes.name: _OrganisationPermissionService
nodes.summary: Service resolving a user's organisation-level user/group/role permission querysets.

nodes.name: _ProjectPermissionService
nodes.summary: Service resolving a user's project-level user/group/role permission querysets.

nodes.name: _EnvironmentPermissionService
nodes.summary: Service resolving environment-level permissions, including admin inheritance from the parent project.

nodes.name: get_organisation_permission_data
nodes.summary: Assembles aggregate PermissionData for a user within an organisation.

nodes.name: get_project_permission_data
nodes.summary: Assembles aggregate PermissionData for a user within a project.

nodes.name: get_environment_permission_data
nodes.summary: Assembles aggregate PermissionData for a user within an environment.

nodes.name: get_user_permission_data
nodes.summary: Maps a user permission row into a UserPermissionData object.

nodes.name: get_groups_permission_data
nodes.summary: Maps a group permission queryset into GroupPermissionData objects.

nodes.name: is_master_api_key_object_admin
nodes.summary: Stub checking master-API-key admin status on an object via RBAC roles (no-op without enterprise RBAC).

nodes.name: get_permitted_projects_for_master_api_key_using_roles
nodes.summary: Stub returning RBAC-role-permitted projects for a master API key.

nodes.name: get_permitted_environments_for_master_api_key_using_roles
nodes.summary: Stub returning RBAC-role-permitted environments for a master API key.

nodes.name: master_api_key_has_organisation_permission_using_roles
nodes.summary: Stub checking master-API-key organisation permission via RBAC roles.

nodes.name: Command
nodes.summary: Management command creating an initial project under a named organisation.

nodes.name: UserABC
nodes.summary: Abstract base defining the user contract: authentication, membership and permission-checking methods.

nodes.name: UserOrganisationInline
nodes.summary: Admin inline displaying a user's organisation memberships.

nodes.name: CustomUserAdmin
nodes.summary: Django admin for the custom user model with organisation inline and fieldset configuration.

nodes.name: AuthType
nodes.summary: Enum of supported user authentication mechanisms.
